regulation_name: Act against Unjustifiable Premiums and Misleading Representations
summary: Double pricing and misleading discount representations are prohibited under fair representation rules.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Two-price display, percentage off, or limited-time sale claims. ACTION: WARN — verify reference price compliance. CHECK: Reference price period and actual selling history. ESCALATE IF: Fake reference price or misleading two-price tactic.
